choices.d: The difference between true track and magnetic track

VFR Navigation Charts (VNC Series) are based on a Lambert Conformal Conic Projection. The following list contains three properties characteristic of this projection and three other properties characteristics of a Mercator projection. A. Meridians are straight, parallel lines, intersecting the parallel (which are also straight, parallel lines) at right angles B. Meridians are converging lines, intersecting the parallels (which are concentric arcs of circles) at right angles C. A straight line represents a great circle D. A straight line represents a rhumb line E. Scale errors are small, hence the scale may be considered constant over a single sheet F. Scale varies with latitude and is only constant at the equator, hence distance must be measured on the latitude scale adjacent to the area. Which of the following includes the three items which are characteristic of the Lambert Conformal Conic Projection?

choices.b: 1 inch on the map = one millionth of a mile
choices.d: 1 inch on the map = 1,000,000 inches on the ground
